name: NPG card session is created successfully for each language -- @1.5

steps.name: Given that checkout host is configured through environment variable
And the checkout NPG environment variables are configured
Given the credit card payment method id is resolved
When the user creates an NPG card session with language "en"
Then the response has status code 200
And the NPG session response contains valid card form fields with payment method CARDS

fullName: Checkout eCommerce — NPG payment gateway: NPG card session is created successfully for each language
